task_objective: Add elapsed_ms timing to all updater log messages (frontend and backend) and implement a stable install button row layout so loading/spinner state cannot change button height.
tests_added: test_frontend_updater_static: assertions for elapsed_ms in comp_content and installer_content, performance.now(), minHeight, lineHeight, buttonRowStyle
test_updater_backend_logging_and_privacy: assertions for elapsed_ms in cache-hit, rate-limit, fetch-failed, revalidation-success, revalidation-rate-limit, and revalidation-fetch-failed log messages

commits.message: feat(updater): add elapsed_ms timing to all updater logs and stable button row layout
fix(updater): truncate artifact URLs in mismatch log to avoid leaking full download URLs

design_decisions: Used performance.now() in frontend for timing; time.monotonic() in backend for all paths.
elapsed_ms is emitted at every log exit point in check_for_update, revalidate_plugin_update, and check_for_plugin_update.

buttonRowStyle and spinnerSlotStyle defined as module-level CSSProperties constants; both loading and non-loading states render through the same <div style={buttonRowStyle}> wrapper so button height is stable.
Installer adapter timing starts before API-path selection so the elapsed includes the entire invoke overhead.
Principal engineer review flagged a pre-existing artifact URL privacy issue (full URL in mismatch log): fixed by truncating to first 32 chars in candidate_prefix/fetched_prefix fields.
check_reuse path emits elapsed_ms=0 per plan spec (no timer started for an immediate in-flight reuse).
